TopModule.BindInstances: re_U re_1_U im_U im_1_U add_ln267_fu_1144_p2 add_ln267_1_fu_2053_p2 add_ln267_2_fu_2063_p2 add_ln267_3_fu_2073_p2 add_ln267_4_fu_2679_p2 add_ln267_5_fu_3539_p2 add_ln267_6_fu_3601_p2 add_ln267_7_fu_3611_p2 blk_exp TW_COS_LUT_U TW_SIN_LUT_U control_s_axi_U AXI_IN_m_axi_U AXI_OUT_m_axi_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding, Resource Estimate
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: CTRL, 0x00, 32, RW, Control signals, 0=AP_START 1=AP_DONE 2=AP_IDLE 3=AP_READY 7=AUTO_RESTART 9=INTERRUPT
GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
in_re_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of in_re,
in_re_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of in_re,
in_im_1, 0x1c, 32, W, Data signal of in_im,

out_im_2, 0x38, 32, W, Data signal of out_im,
blk_exp, 0x40, 32, R, Data signal of blk_exp,
blk_exp_ctrl, 0x44, 32, R, Control signal of blk_exp, 0=blk_exp_ap_vld
clock, ap_clk
reset, ap_rst_n
interrupt, interrupt
ap_ctrl_hs,

in, short*

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.keys: HW Interface, Variable, Access Location, Direction, Burst Status, Length, Loop, Loop Location, Resolution, Problem
table.column: , serial_fft/fft_serial.cpp:219:13, read, Fail, , , , 214-224, Could not burst due to multiple potential reads to the same bundle in the same region.

in_re, serial_fft/fft_serial.cpp:222:29, read, Widen Fail, , load_loop, serial_fft/fft_serial.cpp:219:13, 214-353, Could not widen since type i16 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0

, serial_fft/fft_serial.cpp:273:17, write, Fail, , , , 214-224, Could not burst due to multiple potential writes to the same bundle in the same region.

out_re, serial_fft/fft_serial.cpp:275:12, write, Widen Fail, , store_loop, serial_fft/fft_serial.cpp:273:17, 214-353, Could not widen since type i16 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
